# dcmi\_get\_device\_sensor\_info<a name="EN-US_TOPIC_0000002546990451"></a>

**Prototype<a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_toc533412077"></a>**

**int dcmi\_get\_device\_sensor\_info\(int card\_id, int device\_id, enum dcmi\_manager\_sensor\_id sensor\_id, union dcmi\_sensor\_info \*sensor\_info\)**

**Description<a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_toc533412078"></a>**

Obtains the sensor information of a device.

<div class="note" id="note102181227171418"><a name="note102181227171418"></a><a name="note102181227171418"></a><span class="notetitle"> NOTE: </span><div class="notebody"><p id="en-us_topic_0000002515350528_p10218227151413"><a name="en-us_topic_0000002515350528_p10218227151413"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000002515350528_p10218227151413"></a>The value of <strong id="en-us_topic_0000002515350528_b551771083414"><a name="en-us_topic_0000002515350528_b551771083414"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000002515350528_b551771083414"></a>device_id_max</strong> is <strong id="en-us_topic_0000002515350528_b1263401315345"><a name="en-us_topic_0000002515350528_b1263401315345"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000002515350528_b1263401315345"></a>2</strong>. </div></div>

<p id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p1947617414301"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p1947617414301"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p1947617414301"></a><strong id="b86551648162916"><a name="b86551648162916"></a><a name="b86551648162916"></a>0</strong>: <strong id="b76551848142917"><a name="b76551848142917"></a><a name="b76551848142917"></a>DCMI_CLUSTER_TEMP_ID</strong>, indicating the cluster temperature. The return value is of the <strong id="b1365584816295"><a name="b1365584816295"></a><a name="b1365584816295"></a>uchar</strong> type.</p>
<p id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p3476114118308"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p3476114118308"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p3476114118308"></a><strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b182641649497"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b182641649497"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b182641649497"></a>1</strong>: <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b42658424911"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b42658424911"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b42658424911"></a>DCMI_PERI_TEMP_ID</strong>, indicating the PERI temperature. The return value is of the <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b12265104104915"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b12265104104915"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b12265104104915"></a>uchar</strong> type.</p>
<p id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p15476144117305"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p15476144117305"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p15476144117305"></a><strong id="b51741551192915"><a name="b51741551192915"></a><a name="b51741551192915"></a>2</strong>: <strong id="b13174115132913"><a name="b13174115132913"></a><a name="b13174115132913"></a>DCMI_AICORE0_TEMP_ID</strong>, indicating the AI Core 0 temperature. The return value is of the <strong id="b8174145116293"><a name="b8174145116293"></a><a name="b8174145116293"></a>uchar</strong> type.</p>
<p id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p847644193012"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p847644193012"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p847644193012"></a><strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b13197174916499"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b13197174916499"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b13197174916499"></a>3</strong>: <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b131979490490"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b131979490490"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b131979490490"></a>DCMI_AICORE1_TEMP_ID</strong>, indicating the AI Core 1 temperature. The return value is of the <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b7198749164918"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b7198749164918"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b7198749164918"></a>uchar</strong> type.</p>
<p id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p347684193017"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p347684193017"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p347684193017"></a><strong id="b8917754112917"><a name="b8917754112917"></a><a name="b8917754112917"></a>4</strong>: <strong id="b8917654182916"><a name="b8917654182916"></a><a name="b8917654182916"></a>DCMI_AICORE_LIMIT_ID</strong>. The return value is of the <strong id="b5917165432912"><a name="b5917165432912"></a><a name="b5917165432912"></a>uchar</strong> type, where <strong id="b1917254152911"><a name="b1917254152911"></a><a name="b1917254152911"></a>0</strong> indicates limited and <strong id="b18917125422918"><a name="b18917125422918"></a><a name="b18917125422918"></a>1</strong> indicates unlimited.</p>
<p id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p64760410300"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p64760410300"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p64760410300"></a><strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b8703721175010"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b8703721175010"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b8703721175010"></a>5</strong>: <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b16703132105010"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b16703132105010"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b16703132105010"></a>DCMI_AICORE_TOTAL_PER_ID</strong>, indicating the total AI Core pulse period. The return value is of the <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b5704112113506"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b5704112113506"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b5704112113506"></a>uchar</strong> type.</p>
<p id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p2047615414308"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p2047615414308"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p2047615414308"></a><strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b81880377509"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b81880377509"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b81880377509"></a>6</strong>: <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b018918376503"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b018918376503"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b018918376503"></a>DCMI_AICORE_ELIM_PER_ID</strong>, indicating the AI Core eliminating period. The return value is of the <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b171891437105016"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b171891437105016"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b171891437105016"></a>uchar</strong> type.</p>
<p id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p2476164110305"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p2476164110305"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p2476164110305"></a><strong id="b929162822517"><a name="b929162822517"></a><a name="b929162822517"></a>7</strong>: <strong id="b4291102818256"><a name="b4291102818256"></a><a name="b4291102818256"></a>DCMI_AICORE_BASE_FREQ_ID</strong>, indicating the AI Core reference frequency (MHz). The return value is of the <strong id="b10291728192513"><a name="b10291728192513"></a><a name="b10291728192513"></a>ushort</strong> type.</p>
<p id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p13476164111305"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p13476164111305"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p13476164111305"></a><strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b756472417519"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b756472417519"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b756472417519"></a>8</strong>: <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b95641124195112"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b95641124195112"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b95641124195112"></a>DCMI_NPU_DDR_FREQ_ID</strong>, indicating the DDR frequency (MHz). The return value is of the <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b115659242518"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b115659242518"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b115659242518"></a>ushort</strong> type.</p>
<p id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p1047654153011"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p1047654153011"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p1047654153011"></a><strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b766024216513"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b766024216513"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b766024216513"></a>9</strong>: <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b4661174212513"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b4661174212513"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b4661174212513"></a>DCMI_THERMAL_THRESHOLD_ID</strong>. The return value is of the <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b10661114285110"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b10661114285110"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b10661114285110"></a>temp[2]</strong> type. <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b12661142195118"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b12661142195118"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b12661142195118"></a>temp[0]</strong> indicates the frequency limit temperature for temperature saturation, and <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b9662124285111"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b9662124285111"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b9662124285111"></a>temp[1]</strong> indicates the system reset temperature.</p>
<p id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p1947610415306"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p1947610415306"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p1947610415306"></a><strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b1324194117525"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b1324194117525"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b1324194117525"></a>10</strong>: <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b17868444529"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b17868444529"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b17868444529"></a>DCMI_NTC_TEMP_ID</strong>. The return value is of the <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b1855112425219"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b1855112425219"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b1855112425219"></a>ntc_tmp[4]</strong> type. <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b20855122416520"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b20855122416520"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b20855122416520"></a>ntc_tmp[0]</strong>, <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b185614243526"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b185614243526"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b185614243526"></a>ntc_tmp[1]</strong>, <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b1985742415525"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b1985742415525"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b1985742415525"></a>ntc_tmp[2]</strong>, and <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b48572247520"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b48572247520"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b48572247520"></a>ntc_tmp[3]</strong> correspond to the temperature of four thermistors, respectively.</p>
<p id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p20476164119303"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p20476164119303"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p20476164119303"></a><strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b16295133513537"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b16295133513537"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b16295133513537"></a>11</strong>: <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b1229583585314"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b1229583585314"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b1229583585314"></a>DCMI_SOC_TEMP_ID</strong>, indicating the highest SoC temperature. The return value is of the <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b229653555312"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b229653555312"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b229653555312"></a>uchar</strong> type.</p>
<p id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p147684113308"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p147684113308"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p147684113308"></a><strong id="b1454575632911"><a name="b1454575632911"></a><a name="b1454575632911"></a>12</strong>: <strong id="b5545756112911"><a name="b5545756112911"></a><a name="b5545756112911"></a>DCMI_FP_TEMP_ID</strong>, indicating the highest temperature of the optical module. The return value is of the <strong id="b2545175692917"><a name="b2545175692917"></a><a name="b2545175692917"></a>signed int iint</strong> type.</p>
<p id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p1547614412305"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p1547614412305"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p1547614412305"></a><strong id="b10367125816292"><a name="b10367125816292"></a><a name="b10367125816292"></a>13</strong>: <strong id="b2367358192914"><a name="b2367358192914"></a><a name="b2367358192914"></a>DCMI_N_DIE_TEMP_ID</strong>, indicating the N_DIE temperature. The return value is of the <strong id="b536865862918"><a name="b536865862918"></a><a name="b536865862918"></a>signed int iint</strong> type.</p>
<p id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p114763419306"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p114763419306"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p114763419306"></a><strong id="b95581742309"><a name="b95581742309"></a><a name="b95581742309"></a>14</strong>: <strong id="b1255844143016"><a name="b1255844143016"></a><a name="b1255844143016"></a>DCMI_HBM_TEMP_ID</strong>, indicating the highest temperature of on-chip memory. The return value is of the <strong id="b1655814413016"><a name="b1655814413016"></a><a name="b1655814413016"></a>signed int iint</strong> type.</p>
<p id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p31089182199"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p31089182199"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p31089182199"></a><strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b16921176553"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b16921176553"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b16921176553"></a>11</strong> to <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b19841027175511"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b19841027175511"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b19841027175511"></a>14</strong> are supported in this scenario.</p>
<div class="note" id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_note3722171515"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_note3722171515"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_note3722171515"></a><span class="notetitle"> NOTE: </span><div class="notebody"><p id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p44421721202418"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p44421721202418"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p44421721202418"></a>DCMI_FP_TEMP_ID:</p>
<a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_ul18432021162417"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_ul18432021162417"></a><ul id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_ul18432021162417"><li>If no optical module is installed, error code <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b95550568315"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b95550568315"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b95550568315"></a>-8008</strong> is returned.</li><li>If an optical module is installed, the normal temperature is displayed.</li><li>If a copper cable is inserted and the temperature cannot be queried, <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b591121013417"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b591121013417"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_b591121013417"></a>0x7EFF</strong> is returned.</li></ul>
</div></div>
</td>
</tr>
<tr id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_row159356551547"><td class="cellrowborder" valign="top" width="17%" headers="mcps1.1.5.1.1 "><p id="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p216914591746"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p216914591746"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_p216914591746"></a>sensor_info</p>
</td>

**Example<a name="en-us_topic_0000001206307252_en-us_topic_0000001178213196_en-us_topic_0000001101177320_toc533412083"></a>**

```c
...
int ret = 0;
int card_id = 0;
int device_id = 0;
enum dcmi_manager_sensor_id sensor_id = DCMI_CLUSTER_TEMP_ID;
union dcmi_sensor_info sensor_info = {0};
ret = dcmi_get_device_sensor_info(card_id, device_id, sensor_id, &sensor_info);
if (ret != 0){
    // todo: Record logs.
    return ret;
}
...
```
